LanguageData.EasyMode_NanoEmergencyDespawn: {PAWN_nameDef} was critically wounded. Nanomachines disassembled the body for emergency reconstruction ({0} days).
LanguageData.EasyMode_NanoEmergencyRespawn: {PAWN_nameDef} has been reconstructed by nanomachines and returned at full health.
LanguageData.EasyMode_NanoDebugNoComponent: Nano respawn component is not available.
